rulings.Case Title: BRUCE E. KRELL ET AL VS. PATRICIA ANN HUNTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Regarding Cross Complaint For Partnership Accounting (Ccp438, 343 And 339(1))
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday August 25, 2015, Line 1. PLAINTIFF BRUCE KRELL and PAMELA KRELL's Amended Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Regarding Cross Complaint For Partnership Accounting (Ccp438, 343 And 339(1)) DENIED. Nothing on the face of the cross-complaint shows that causes of action (arising within 4 years of complaint) brought by the Hunter Trust are barred by the statute of limitations. Estate of Peebles (1972) 27 Cal.App.3d 163 is distinguishable. The case at bar does not involve a general partnership terminated by death of one of the partners. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRUCE E. KRELL ET AL VS. PATRICIA ANN HUNTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday August 25, 2015, Line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT PATRICIA HUNTER's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint DENIED without prejudice. Cross-complainant's may re-file the motion in compliance with CRC 3.1324. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRUCE E. KRELL ET AL VS. PATRICIA ANN HUNTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Order Appointing Appraiser Pursuant To Written Tenants In Common Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday August 25, 2015, Line 1. PLAINTIFF BRUCE KRELL and PAMELA KRELL's Motion For Order Appointing Appraiser Pursuant To Written Tenants In Common Agreement DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff's request is premature. No determination as to the date of valuation has been made. Plaintiff's Notice on Motion does not seek such relief (re determination) and points and authorities do not cite any authority for the proposition that such relief may be granted on a motion to appoint appraiser. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday August 25, 2015, Line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED to September 23, 2015 on Court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QING MEI HUA VS. WONG FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday August 25, 2015, Line 3. DEFENDANT WONG FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QING MEI HUA VS. WONG FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday August 25, 2015, Line 3. DEFENDANT WONG FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and denied in part. Motion is GRANTED as to the request for punitive damages with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the motion. Motion is DENIED as to the request for attorney's fees. Complaint alleges that fees that the lease contains an attorneys' fees provision (paragraph 92). =(501/REQ)
